title: Marzipan Delight Fry
description: A sweet and crispy treat made with marzipan, perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: 1. Cut the marzipan into small cubes.
2. Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 180°C.
3. Carefully add the marzipan cubes to the hot oil in batches.
4. Fry for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
5. Remove the fried marzipan with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
